caribbean.headline: Heavy Rainfall Impacts San Juan Amid Moderate Winds
caribbean.paragraph: San Juan is experiencing heavy rain with a 92% rain probability accompanied by northeast swells reaching 3.5 feet and a 10-second period. Winds are moderate at 15 knots, while St. Lucia observes lighter conditions with 12-knot winds and less than 10% rain probability.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain Floods Dubrovnik Amid Moderate Winds
mediterranean.paragraph: Dubrovnik is experiencing heavy rain with 98% rain probability, accompanied by southwest swells generating 4.8-foot waves and sustained winds of 15 knots. Conditions pose localized flooding risks while seas remain moderate with a 5-second swell period, and Lisbon reports lighter winds of 13 knots with less than 10% rain probability.
